channel.title: IMO Meeting rooms and locations
channel.description: IMO committee room information for delegate

item.title: Main Hall — III 12 | Plenary | Ground floor
Committee Room 9 — III 12 | WG 3 | Working Group on Survey Guidelines under the HSSC, the Non-exhaustive list of obligations, and Guidance on the ISM Code | Second floor
Committee Room 10 — III 12 | WG 2 | Working Group on Port State Control | Second floor
Committee Room 11–13 — III 12 | WG 1 | Working Group on Casualty Investigation | Second floor
Committee Room 3–5 — III 12 | DG 1 | Drafting Group on Analysis of Consolidated Audit Summary Reports | First floor
Committee Room 6–8 — III 12 | EG 1 | Experts Group on Fishing Vessels | First floor
Committee Room 14 — 09:30 - 17:30: III 12; 14:00 - 16:00: Visit from Midwestern State University | Second floor
